name: Twitter Capture
description: Native Twitter/X capture gear for saving tweet, list, or user timeline content into a local file database.

capabilities.title: Fetch tweet URL
capabilities.description: Create a Twitter Capture task for one tweet URL and return the saved tweet content.
examples: Download the content from this X post

capabilities.title: Fetch list URL
capabilities.description: Create a Twitter Capture task for a Twitter/X list URL and return the first N tweet records.
examples: Fetch the first 20 tweets from this Twitter list
Download 50 tweets from this X list

capabilities.title: Fetch user tweets
capabilities.description: Create a Twitter Capture task for a username or profile URL and return the first N tweet records.
examples: Download the first 20 tweets from this username
